reviews.comment:
Buena atención. No he tenido problemas con el combustible. Cobran con la app de Serviclub. Ir con tiempo, siempre hay una fila de vehículos (en doble fila) por Avenida Martín Garcia y para cargar se puede demorar unos 20 minutos, en horas pico quizá un poco más. No hay muchos surtidores son  4 o 5. Alguno de ellos tiene manómetro y pico para inflar neumáticos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. I haven't had any problems with fuel. They charge using the Serviclub app. Get there early; there's always a line of vehicles (double-parked) along Avenida Martín Garcia, and filling up can take about 20 minutes, perhaps a little longer during rush hour. There aren't many pumps, there are only four or five. Some have a pressure gauge and a tire inflator.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNXRLNnpnRRAB
